UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OWENS, MILTON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 241 SIXTH STREET, UNIT #204A, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94103, ** JUDGMENT INCLUDES ANY/ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISE **SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
